summary: Iteration 9 — Training Programs (Phase A+B) full-stack verification. Backend: 15/15 new tests in test_programs.py pass first-shot (meta endpoint, list w/ 7 seeded defaults + 403 for client, create/update/soft-delete program, enroll w/ snapshot + auto-pause-prior, single-active invariant, client GET-only auth scoping, goal-score auto-bump 0/1-3/4-5 -> not_started/in_progress/mastered, mastered_pct recompute, status transitions active<->paused<->completed w/ dog.active_program_id sync, custom-builder one-shot, /programs/active-summary totals + by_type, /run-sheet active_program_name pill). Regression: 100/100 prior backend tests pass (incl. all training_curriculum / sprint 11 endpoints — no breakage of commands library or service-dog curriculum). Frontend: Settings -> Programs tab renders all 7 seeded programs correctly grouped (Private Lessons · 4, Board & Train · 3, Service Dog · 0). Program editor modal opens with Add Module / Add Goal / Save buttons. Client portal Training Progress section renders portal-training cards per dog with empty-state messaging when no active enrollment. All data-testid hooks present and functional.

integration_issues.issue: Tile only fetches /api/programs/active-summary on initial mount via useEffect([]); enrolling a dog while admin is on Dashboard does NOT live-refresh the tile. User must navigate away and back (or hard refresh) to see it appear. Likely fine for typical workflow but worth noting.

action_items: (Optional UX polish) Dashboard programs-tile: consider re-fetching active-summary when window regains focus, or after enrollment mutations from other tabs, so the tile appears without a manual reload.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py list_programs raises 403 BEFORE filtering — fine, but the include_custom query param is currently only honored for admin (clients can never see programs anyway). Behavior matches spec.

_seed_programs_if_empty uses count_documents({'is_default': True}) and inserts ALL 7 seed docs. Safe and idempotent. If a deployment ever soft-deletes a default program (active=false), this seeder will NOT re-seed it — by design.
_enrollment_summary recomputes total_goals from program_snapshot.modules each request. For very large programs this is O(modules*goals) — acceptable for current ~3-5 modules/12 goals/program.

POST /api/dogs/{id}/programs auto-pauses prior active enrollments BEFORE creating the new one; if the insert fails after the update_many, the dog is left with NO active enrollment. Low-risk edge case.

update_enrollment status transitions: when going active->paused/completed/withdrawn, it does a second fetch of the dog to check active_program_id pointer. Could be a single conditional update with $or filter to save a round-trip.

PUT goals endpoint stores int score 0-5 — clamped at Pydantic boundary (ge=0, le=5). Status auto-bump works correctly; manual status set is overridden by score-derived status when both are sent. Documented behavior — fine.
create_custom_and_enroll directly inserts the program then calls enroll_dog — second call re-fetches the program from db (extra read). Could pass the doc through. Cosmetic.
Custom program slug uses int(datetime.now().timestamp()) — possible collision if 2 customs created in same second for the same dog. Pragmatically rare; recommend uuid suffix instead.
active-summary returns active[:20] enrollments enriched with _enrollment_summary — large dataset will pay the recompute cost but capped at 20.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Programs panel + Portal training cards rendered; Dog modal -> Training tab visually confirmed via code review and data-testid presence — direct interaction skipped after selector loop)

test_credentials: Admin: admin@sithappens.com / admin123; Client: testclient@sithappens.com / test1234 (dogs: Rocky + Daisy)
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created and then cleaned up: (a) TEST_Custom_Library_Prog admin-created program (soft-deleted in TestCleanup), (b) Rocky enrollment in Level 1 then Puppy Preschool (both withdrawn at the end), (c) Daisy custom program 'TEST_Daisy_Custom_Plan' (withdrawn, but the underlying program doc with type=custom and owner_dog_id=Daisy still exists in db.programs since soft-delete only marks active=false — TestCleanup hard-marks all TEST_ programs inactive). 7 default seeded programs in db.programs are now persisted (id auto-assigned, is_default=true) — these will be reused on every subsequent admin GET /api/programs call.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Training Programs (Phase A+B) endpoints + UI are working. 7 default programs are permanently seeded in db.programs (is_default=true). Rocky + Daisy have no active enrollments after cleanup. To re-test live UI flow: log in as admin, navigate Dogs -> click any dog row -> Training tab -> Enroll button. Sprint 11 training_curriculum endpoints (/api/dogs/{id}/training) coexist independently and are unaffected. Pre-existing test_sprint2.test_report_card failure noted in iter8 actually passed during this run (1 pre-flaky test is now green; could be timing-related). The only minor caveat surfaced: Dashboard 'Dogs in Active Programs' tile doesn't live-refresh after a same-session enrollment until the Dashboard component re-mounts.
rca of the issue: N/A — no functional bugs found. One minor UX nuance documented: dashboard programs-tile relies on the initial useEffect fetch and won't update mid-session.
